basic_details.job_title: DCHS Palnadu Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 22 Lab Attendant, Theatre Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Coordinator of Hospital Services (DCHS Palnadu)
basic_details.short_information: District Coordinator of Hospital Services (DCHS Palnadu) Supporting Staff Notification 2026 has been released on 01 July 2026 on the official website palnadu.ap.gov.in. A total of 22 vacancies have been announced through the DCHS Palnadu Supporting Staff Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: For SC, ST, BC and EWS: 5 years; For Ex-service Men: 3 years in addition to length of service; For differently abled: 10 years; Maximum age limit 52 years with all relaxations.

qualification.education_qualification: SSC/10th class or equivalent from recognized Board, Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course) for Lab Attendant post
qualification.details: Lab Attendant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Must Possess Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course) conducted by the Board of Intermediate Education, AP or from any other institution recognized by the Govt of A.P. Theatre Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. General Duty Attendant/ FNO/MNO: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Post Mortem Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Office Subordinate: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board.

selection_process: Merit based on 75% aggregate marks in qualifying examination Up to 10 marks for experience Up to 15% weightage for Contract/Outsourcing service Counselling on merit basis following roster points
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://palnadu.ap.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DCHS Palnadu Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DCHS Palnadu Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.district_coordinator_of_hospital_service: SSC/10th class or equivalent from recognized Board, Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course) for Lab Attendant post

content_sections.heading: DCHS Palnadu Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCHS Palnadu Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DCHS Palnadu Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Lab Attendant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Must Possess Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course) conducted by the Board of Intermediate Education, AP or from any other institution recognized by the Govt of A.P. Theatre Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. General Duty Attendant/ FNO/MNO: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Post Mortem Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Office Subordinate: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: For SC, ST, BC and EWS: 5 years; For Ex-service Men: 3 years in addition to length of service; For differently abled: 10 years; Maximum age limit 52 years with all relaxations.

rows.event: Grievances on provisional merit list are accepted from
Release of Selection List, Conducting of Counselling for Selected Candidates & Issue of Appointment orders

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Merit based on 75% aggregate marks in qualifying examination Up to 10 marks for experience Up to 15% weightage for Contract/Outsourcing service Counselling on merit basis following roster points

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://palnadu.ap.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCHS Palnadu Supporting Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DCHS Palnadu Supporting Staff recruitment is 07-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the authorities before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Supporting Staff posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 22 vacancies announced for various Supporting Staff positions under the District Coordinator of Hospital Services (DCHS Palnadu).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Lab Attendant post?
faq.answer: For the Lab Attendant post, candidates must have passed SSC/10th class or equivalent and possess a Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is between a minimum of 18 years and a maximum of 42 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Supporting Staff positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Supporting Staff positions will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 15,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. In what mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications for the DCHS Palnadu Supporting Staff recruitment must be submitted in Offline mode by sending the filled application form to the specified address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process is based on merit, considering 75% aggregate marks in the qualifying examination, marks for experience, and weightage for contract/outsourcing service, followed by counselling.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any application fees for the DCHS Palnadu recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there are application fees. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 350/-, while SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 250/-. PwBD candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website to download the application form?
faq.answer: The official website to download the application form and find more details is https://palnadu.ap.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates along with the application form.
